info.title: MIIT Investment Projects API
info.description:
HTTP API for the MIIT investment-projects monolith. This spec is a snapshot generated from the route table and request/response DTOs and is served only in the test (develop) environment.

Auth: most endpoints require a JWT via `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Click **Authorize** and paste a token from `POST /test/login`.

servers.description: Same host that served these docs (test env)

parameters.name: project_ids
parameters.description: CSV of project ids to restrict results to (e.g. "12,15,40"); applies p.id IN (...). Non-integer values -> 400. Skipped when all=true.
